evidence.text: Freedom planet react to Brevon and bedrock bath

editableNewDialogue.text: Freedom planet react to Brevon trying to sneak into the town wearing a cardboard cat costume

Lilac: "...Is that Brevon wearing a cardboard box with whiskers drawn on it?"

Carol: "Pff— ‘Meow.’ Real convincing, pal."

Milla: "Maybe he thinks the 'cats are allowed' rule means he can disguise himself..."

Lilac: "It means cats are allowed. Not tyrants in arts-and-crafts." 

Brevon: "I am merely a harmless feline. Observe: I require… snacks."

Carol: "That’s the least cat-like thing I’ve ever heard." 

Milla: "If you truly want to be welcomed, you have to be honest and stop causing trouble."

Lilac: "Costume off, Brevon. Now."

Carol: "Also, your tail is taped on upside down."
Freedom planet react to the cardboard costume falling apart mid-speech

Brevon: "Citizens! I, a humble cat, request—" *RRRIP*

Lilac: "...And there it goes." 

Carol: "Wow. One dramatic pause and the whole thing disintegrated." 

Milla: "Oh no! The tape gave up."

Brevon: "This is sabotage. The adhesive has betrayed me." 

Carol: "Sure, blame the tape. Next you’ll blame gravity." 

Lilac: "Everyone, stay back. He’s trying to turn embarrassment into an escape." 

Milla: "Brevon, please stop running! The box pieces are getting everywhere!"

Carol: "Leave it to a villain to litter during a costume failure."
Freedom planet react to Broly calmly picking up the scraps and saying, "Recycling is important."

Broly: "Recycling is important." 

Lilac: "...I didn’t expect that to be the takeaway, but okay." 

Carol: "Broly just turned a villain chase into a clean-up campaign." 

Milla: "That’s actually very responsible. Thank you, Broly." 

Broly: "Cardboard goes in paper. Tape goes in trash." 

Carol: "Listen, if Brevon comes back in a plastic costume, we’re doomed." 

Lilac: "Focus. We can appreciate recycling after we stop him." 

Milla: "Maybe we can stop him *and* keep the town clean." 

Carol: "Fine. I’ll chase. Broly can be the recycling hero. Lilac can do the hero-hero thing."
Freedom planet react to Brevon trying to sneak past the "cats only" rule by wearing a cardboard cat mask, while Lilac is the one who notices first.

Lilac: "...Hold up. That 'cat' has shoulder pads."

Carol: "Pfft—no way. Let me see." 

Milla: "Oh! The whiskers are drawn on with marker... that's kind of clever, actually."

Brevon (muffled): "Mrrrow." 

Lilac: "Nice try, Brevon. Real cats don't stomp like they're marching into battle." 

Carol: "Should we start a new rule? 'Cats only' and 'no obvious cardboard disguises'?" 

Milla: "Maybe we can just... offer him a towel from the bath house again and send him away peacefully?" 

Lilac: "No. He turns up every time the town relaxes."
Freedom planet react to Brevon and bedrock bath again.

Lilac: "Hold on—why do people keep saying 'bedrock bath'? There isn't any bedrock bath here."

Carol: "Yeah, that's not a thing on Avalice. Last time was just us stumbling into some regular old bathhouse underground."

Milla: "It was warm and steamy, but it definitely wasn't made of bedrock. Just stone and tile!"

Lilac: "And Brevon wasn't 'turning over a new leaf' either. He was hiding out and trying to slip away while we argued about it."

Carol: "Exactly. No redemption speech. Just Brevon being Brevon."
So it wasn't some special bedrock place?

Lilac: "No. Just a bathhouse. The 'bedrock bath' thing got exaggerated."

Milla: "We should be careful with rumors like that."

Carol: "Next thing you know, people will say Broly built it or something."

turns.text:
Lilac: "No. Just a bathhouse. The 'bedrock bath' thing got exaggerated."

Milla: "We should be careful with rumors like that."

Carol: "Next thing you know, people will say Broly built it or something."
